[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000101100 3
1 000100000 1
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 010010010 3
7 000001100 2
